items.title: [正面] It's a card-battler that was recommended to me. Se...
items.summary: It's a card-battler that was recommended to me. Seemingly sketchy Chinese company (but using Japanese audio!?). Not bad. Terrible GPT translations. Game based on Lovecraftian themes, yet told from an Asian anime perspective. Alright, I guess.
